channel.title: GRBK — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on GRBK (Green Brick Partners) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Polen Capital: NEW POSITION GRBK (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) new position GRBK in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED GRBK (+4%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added GRBK in Q4 2025 · 29.4% of portfolio. Top conviction: more Green Brick.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Einhorn)

item.title: David Einhorn: ADDED GRBK (+5%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) added GRBK in Q3 2025 · 28.7% of portfolio. Top conviction add — homebuilder.
